title: calophyllum verticillatum
intro: Calophyllum verticillatum, also known as the "Red Sandalwood" or "Red Sandal", is a plant species in the Calophyllaceae family, native to Southeast Asia. The plant's medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Calophyllum verticillatum include treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as reducing inflammation and pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of essential oil or extract, often combined with other natural ingredients to create topical creams, ointments, and salves.
